ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in kilograms) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* Current fitness level of the player */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the metrics were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose metrics are recorded */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the player */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of successful conversions made by the player */,
  "conversion_percentage" REAL /* Conversion percentage calculated from attempts and conversions */,
  "playing_time" INTEGER /* Total playing time of the player in the game */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game split type */,
  "split_name" TEXT /* Name of the game split category (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "split_description" TEXT /* Description of the game split category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_splits" (
  "player_split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player split entry */,
  "split_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game split type */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the player in the specific split */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of successful conversions made by the player in the specific split */,
  "conversion_percentage" REAL /* Conversion percentage in the specific split */,
  "playing_time" INTEGER /* Total playing time of the player in the specific split */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the specific split */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the specific split */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player in the specific split */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the specific split */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the specific split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_splits_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_splits_split_id FOREIGN KEY ("split_id") REFERENCES game_splits ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the coach belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the coach has been coaching */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the coach (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
